description: Twiddles provides twiddle lists for incrementally composing values of different types and converting them to shape-compatible case classes. The core module offers syntax and abstractions for building protocol-like structures such as decoders, encoders, and codecs using Cats invariant semigroupal and invariant type classes.

Twiddles provides twiddle lists for incrementally composing values of different types and converting them to shape-compatible case classes. The core module offers syntax and abstractions for building protocol-like structures such as decoders, encoders, and codecs using Cats invariant semigroupal and invariant type classes.
